chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 61 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 17.04.2024 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Associate of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On last date of hearing, when it was reported that entire payments of retirement benefits have been made to the petitioner, the case was adjourned to today for verification as no one was present for petitioner. Today also, no one has appeared on behalf of petitioner and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
